creator: dteske@FreeBSD.org
text: Works to open items, but I guess perhaps a symptom of --no-shm is that the preview is not generated for files in the open dialog until you actually open the file. Previews that have been generated by opening the file persist beyond relaunching the application -- so they are likely being stored in an on-disk cache. However, they aren't generating on-the-fly in the open dialog as they have in the past (instead displaying a message "cannot create preview" as a placeholder until you open the file).
